WhatsApp._comment: WhatsApp Cloud API alerts. Leave AccessToken/PhoneNumberId empty to disable. Set real values via the EnvironmentFile.
WhatsApp._eventComment: Event-alert template. Switch to the deep-link template (button) once approved: EventTemplate=vigishield_general_alert_deeplink, EventTemplateLang=es, EventTemplateHasButton=true. Body params order: {{1}}=event {{2}}=camera {{3}}=date {{4}}=time; the button fills https://vigishield.app/event/{{1}} with the event id.

Fcm._comment: Firebase Cloud Messaging push. Disabled until ProjectId + ServiceAccountPath are set (put the Firebase service-account JSON on the server; set Fcm__ProjectId + Fcm__ServiceAccountPath in the env file).
